_comment: Answers for `databricks bundle init` -> sdp-meta DAB template, scenario A2: combined bronze+silver in ONE Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline (pipeline_mode=combined) reading cloudFiles. Same demo data + recipe as `cloudfiles_split.json`; only `bundle_name` and `pipeline_mode` differ. {uc_catalog_name}, {sdp_meta_schema}, {bronze_target_schema}, and {silver_target_schema} are substituted by demo/launch_dab_template_demo.py at runtime (driven by --uc-catalog-name and --uc-schema).
author: dab-template-demo
